proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `flt3_itd` mutation have a different objective_response rate than those without flt3_itd.
Patients with `npm1_mutation` have a higher objective_response rate than those without npm1_mutation.
Patients with `tp53_mutation` have a lower objective_response rate than those without tp53_mutation.
Patients with `complex_karyotype` have a lower objective_response rate than those without complex karyotype.

analyses.code: chi2 test of flt3_itd vs objective_response
analyses.result_summary: objective_response: 0.1719 with flt3_itd=1 (n=10000) vs 0.1683 without (n=40000); chi2 p=0.402.

analyses.code: chi2 test of npm1_mutation vs objective_response
analyses.result_summary: objective_response: 0.1732 with npm1_mutation=1 (n=15014) vs 0.1673 without (n=34986); chi2 p=0.109.

analyses.code: chi2 test of tp53_mutation vs objective_response
analyses.result_summary: objective_response: 0.1657 with tp53_mutation=1 (n=4985) vs 0.1694 without (n=45015); chi2 p=0.52.

analyses.code: chi2 test of complex_karyotype vs objective_response
analyses.result_summary: objective_response: 0.1681 with complex_karyotype=1 (n=7462) vs 0.1692 without (n=42538); chi2 p=0.818.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `flt3_tkd` mutation have a different objective_response rate than those without flt3_tkd.
Patients with `idh1_mutation` have a different objective_response rate than those without idh1_mutation.
Patients with `idh2_mutation` have a different objective_response rate than those without idh2_mutation.
Patients with `secondary_aml` have a lower objective_response rate than de novo AML patients.
Patients flagged `unfit_for_intensive` have a lower objective_response rate than fit patients.

analyses.code: chi2 test of flt3_tkd vs objective_response
analyses.result_summary: objective_response: 0.1627 with flt3_tkd=1 (n=2815) vs 0.1694 without (n=47185); chi2 p=0.369.

analyses.code: chi2 test of idh1_mutation vs objective_response
analyses.result_summary: objective_response: 0.2213 with idh1_mutation=1 (n=3624) vs 0.1650 without (n=46376); chi2 p=3.52e-18.

analyses.code: chi2 test of idh2_mutation vs objective_response
analyses.result_summary: objective_response: 0.1654 with idh2_mutation=1 (n=4679) vs 0.1694 without (n=45321); chi2 p=0.501.

analyses.code: chi2 test of secondary_aml vs objective_response
analyses.result_summary: objective_response: 0.1687 with secondary_aml=1 (n=12301) vs 0.1692 without (n=37699); chi2 p=0.915.

analyses.code: chi2 test of unfit_for_intensive vs objective_response
analyses.result_summary: objective_response: 0.1695 with unfit_for_intensive=1 (n=20056) vs 0.1687 without (n=29944); chi2 p=0.841.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Older `age_years` is associated with a lower probability of objective_response (logistic regression, per-SD).
Higher `ecog_ps` (worse performance status) is associated with a lower probability of objective_response.
Female patients (`sex_female`=1) have a different objective_response rate than male patients.

analyses.result_summary: age_years: logistic coef per SD = 0.0043 (OR = 1.004), p = 0.718.
ecog_ps: logistic coef per SD = -0.2601 (OR = 0.771), p = 1.84e-97.

analyses.code: chi2 test of sex_female vs objective_response
analyses.result_summary: objective_response: 0.1709 in females (n=22371) vs 0.1675 in males (n=27629); chi2 p=0.326.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Receiving `treatment_midostaurin` is associated with a different objective_response rate vs not receiving it (overall, ignoring biomarkers).
Receiving `treatment_gilteritinib` is associated with a different objective_response rate vs not receiving it (overall).
Receiving `treatment_ivosidenib` is associated with a different objective_response rate vs not receiving it (overall).
Receiving `treatment_enasidenib` is associated with a different objective_response rate vs not receiving it (overall).
Receiving `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` is associated with a different objective_response rate vs not receiving it (overall).
Receiving `treatment_7plus3` is associated with a different objective_response rate vs not receiving it (overall).

analyses.code: chi2 test of treatment_midostaurin vs objective_response
analyses.result_summary: objective_response: 0.1686 on treatment_midostaurin (n=7545) vs 0.1691 off (n=42455); chi2 p=0.923.

analyses.code: chi2 test of treatment_gilteritinib vs objective_response
analyses.result_summary: objective_response: 0.1630 on treatment_gilteritinib (n=7545) vs 0.1701 off (n=42455); chi2 p=0.134.

analyses.code: chi2 test of treatment_ivosidenib vs objective_response
analyses.result_summary: objective_response: 0.1709 on treatment_ivosidenib (n=3938) vs 0.1689 off (n=46062); chi2 p=0.763.

analyses.code: chi2 test of treatment_enasidenib vs objective_response
analyses.result_summary: objective_response: 0.1611 on treatment_enasidenib (n=3972) vs 0.1697 off (n=46028); chi2 p=0.172.

analyses.result_summary: objective_response: 0.1735 on treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine (n=20020) vs 0.1661 off (n=29980); chi2 p=0.0315.

analyses.code: chi2 test of treatment_7plus3 vs objective_response
analyses.result_summary: objective_response: 0.1702 on treatment_7plus3 (n=22580) vs 0.1681 off (n=27420); chi2 p=0.54.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between `treatment_midostaurin` and `flt3_itd` on objective_response: midostaurin increases response specifically in FLT3-ITD positive patients more than in FLT3-ITD negative patients.
Within FLT3-ITD positive patients, those receiving `treatment_midostaurin` have a higher objective_response rate than those not receiving midostaurin.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef = -0.1046 (p=0.219). OR(midostaurin) in FLT3-ITD+ = 0.916; in FLT3-ITD- = 1.017.

analyses.code: Among flt3_itd==1: chi2 of treatment_midostaurin vs objective_response
analyses.result_summary: Within FLT3-ITD+ (n=10000): response = 0.1614 on midostaurin vs 0.1737 off; chi2 p=0.266.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between `treatment_gilteritinib` and `flt3_itd`: gilteritinib increases response in FLT3-ITD+ patients more than in FLT3-ITD- patients.
Within FLT3-ITD positive patients, those receiving `treatment_gilteritinib` have a higher objective_response rate than those not receiving gilteritinib.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef = 0.0339 (p=0.686). OR(gilteritinib) in FLT3-ITD+ = 0.976; in FLT3-ITD- = 0.944.

analyses.code: Among flt3_itd==1: chi2 of treatment_gilteritinib vs objective_response
analyses.result_summary: Within FLT3-ITD+ (n=10000): response = 0.1690 on gilteritinib vs 0.1724 off; chi2 p=0.777.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between `treatment_ivosidenib` and `idh1_mutation`: ivosidenib increases response in IDH1-mutant patients more than in IDH1-wildtype patients.
Within IDH1-mutant patients, those receiving `treatment_ivosidenib` have a higher objective_response rate than those not receiving ivosidenib.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef = -0.3641 (p=0.0271). OR(ivosidenib) in IDH1+ = 0.726; in IDH1- = 1.045.

analyses.code: Among idh1_mutation==1: chi2 of treatment_ivosidenib vs objective_response
analyses.result_summary: Within IDH1+ (n=3624): response = 0.1745 on ivosidenib vs 0.2255 off; chi2 p=0.0501.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between `treatment_enasidenib` and `idh2_mutation`: enasidenib increases response in IDH2-mutant patients more than in IDH2-wildtype patients.
Within IDH2-mutant patients, those receiving `treatment_enasidenib` have a higher objective_response rate than those not receiving enasidenib.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef = -0.1242 (p=0.448). OR(enasidenib) in IDH2+ = 0.839; in IDH2- = 0.949.

analyses.code: Among idh2_mutation==1: chi2 of treatment_enasidenib vs objective_response
analyses.result_summary: Within IDH2+ (n=4679): response = 0.1441 on enasidenib vs 0.1672 off; chi2 p=0.294.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` and `unfit_for_intensive`: venetoclax+azacitidine increases response specifically in unfit patients.
Within unfit-for-intensive patients, those receiving `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` have a higher objective_response rate than those not receiving it.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef = 0.1036 (p=0.0362). OR(ven+aza) in unfit = 1.121; in fit = 1.011.

analyses.code: Among unfit_for_intensive==1: chi2 of treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine vs objective_response
analyses.result_summary: Within unfit (n=20056): response = 0.1792 on ven+aza vs 0.1630 off; chi2 p=0.0029.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a negative interaction between `treatment_7plus3` and `unfit_for_intensive`: 7+3 increases response in fit (unfit=0) patients more than in unfit patients.
Within fit patients (unfit_for_intensive=0), those receiving `treatment_7plus3` have a higher objective_response rate than those not receiving 7+3.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef = -0.0328 (p=0.502). OR(7+3) in unfit = 0.995; in fit = 1.029.

analyses.code: Among unfit_for_intensive==0: chi2 of treatment_7plus3 vs objective_response
analyses.result_summary: Within fit (n=29944): response = 0.1709 on 7+3 vs 0.1670 off; chi2 p=0.372.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a negative interaction between `treatment_7plus3` and `tp53_mutation`: 7+3 is less effective (relative) in TP53-mutant patients than TP53-wildtype.
Within TP53-mutant patients, those receiving `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` have a different objective_response rate than those not receiving it.

analyses.code: Among tp53_mutation==1: chi2 of treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine vs objective_response
analyses.result_summary: Within TP53+ (n=4985): response = 0.1636 on ven+aza vs 0.1672 off; chi2 p=0.766.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between `treatment_gilteritinib` and `flt3_tkd`: gilteritinib increases response in FLT3-TKD+ patients more than in FLT3-TKD- patients.
There is a positive interaction between `treatment_midostaurin` and `flt3_tkd`: midostaurin increases response in FLT3-TKD+ patients more than in FLT3-TKD- patients.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef = -0.1516 (p=0.327). OR(treatment_gilteritinib) in flt3_tkd+ = 0.823; in flt3_tkd- = 0.958.
Interaction coef = 0.0231 (p=0.873). OR(treatment_midostaurin) in flt3_tkd+ = 1.018; in flt3_tkd- = 0.995.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `albumin_g_dl` is associated with a higher probability of objective_response.
Higher `ldh_u_l` is associated with a lower probability of objective_response.
Higher `wbc_k_per_ul` is associated with a lower probability of objective_response.
Higher `blast_pct_marrow` is associated with a lower probability of objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: albumin_g_dl: logistic coef per SD = 0.0577 (OR = 1.059), p = 1.36e-06.
ldh_u_l: logistic coef per SD = -0.0112 (OR = 0.989), p = 0.351.
wbc_k_per_ul: logistic coef per SD = -0.0560 (OR = 0.946), p = 1.88e-05.
blast_pct_marrow: logistic coef per SD = -0.1086 (OR = 0.897), p = 1.16e-19.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `crp_mg_l` is associated with a lower probability of objective_response.
Higher `nlr` (neutrophil:lymphocyte ratio) is associated with a lower probability of objective_response.
Higher `weight_loss_pct_6mo` is associated with a lower probability of objective_response.
Higher `hemoglobin_g_dl` is associated with a higher probability of objective_response.
Higher `platelets_k_ul` is associated with a higher probability of objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: crp_mg_l: logistic coef per SD = -0.0642 (OR = 0.938), p = 2.82e-06.
nlr: logistic coef per SD = -0.0069 (OR = 0.993), p = 0.563.
weight_loss_pct_6mo: logistic coef per SD = -0.1550 (OR = 0.856), p = 7.43e-35.
hemoglobin_g_dl: logistic coef per SD = -0.0172 (OR = 0.983), p = 0.149.
platelets_k_ul: logistic coef per SD = -0.0121 (OR = 0.988), p = 0.312.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `chronic_kidney_disease` have a lower objective_response rate than those without CKD.
Patients with `heart_failure` have a lower objective_response rate than those without heart failure.
Patients with `diabetes_mellitus` have a different objective_response rate than those without diabetes.
Patients with `prior_malignancy` have a different objective_response rate than those without prior malignancy.
Patients with `hypertension` have a different objective_response rate than those without hypertension.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Black patients (`race_ethnicity`='black') have a different objective_response rate than non-Black patients.
Hispanic patients (`race_ethnicity`='hispanic') have a different objective_response rate than non-Hispanic patients.
Patients with Medicaid insurance (`insurance_type`='medicaid') have a lower objective_response rate than non-Medicaid patients.
Uninsured patients (`insurance_type`='uninsured') have a lower objective_response rate than insured patients.
Rural-residence patients (`rural_residence`=1) have a lower objective_response rate than urban patients.

objective_response: 0.1691 rural (n=9996) vs 0.1690 non-rural (n=40004); chi2 p=1.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `snp_rs1045642` (ABCB1) is associated with objective_response (logistic, per allele).
`snp_rs1065852` (CYP2D6*10) is associated with objective_response.
`snp_rs1799853` (CYP2C9*2) is associated with objective_response.
`snp_rs4244285` (CYP2C19*2) is associated with objective_response.
`snp_rs1801133` (MTHFR C677T) is associated with objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: snp_rs1045642: logistic coef = -0.0138 (OR per allele = 0.986), p = 0.564.
snp_rs1065852: logistic coef = 0.0072 (OR per allele = 1.007), p = 0.844.
snp_rs1799853: logistic coef = -0.0783 (OR per allele = 0.925), p = 0.0543.
snp_rs4244285: logistic coef = -0.0109 (OR per allele = 0.989), p = 0.705.
snp_rs1801133: logistic coef = 0.0365 (OR per allele = 1.037), p = 0.159.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `prior_lines_of_therapy` is associated with a lower probability of objective_response.
Patients with `prior_chemotherapy` have a lower objective_response rate than those without prior chemo.
Patients with `prior_radiation` have a different objective_response rate than those without prior radiation.
Higher `years_since_diagnosis` is associated with a lower probability of objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: prior_lines_of_therapy: logistic coef per SD = 0.0078 (OR = 1.008), p = 0.515.
objective_response: 0.1680 with prior_chemotherapy=1 (n=22442) vs 0.1699 (n=27558); chi2 p=0.596.
objective_response: 0.1651 with prior_radiation=1 (n=14941) vs 0.1707 (n=35059); chi2 p=0.13.
years_since_diagnosis: logistic coef per SD = -0.0234 (OR = 0.977), p = 0.0558.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is an interaction between `treatment_7plus3` and `npm1_mutation`: 7+3 produces higher response in NPM1-mutant patients than in NPM1-wildtype patients.
There is an interaction between `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` and `npm1_mutation`: ven+aza produces higher response in NPM1-mutant patients than in NPM1-wildtype.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef = -0.0848 (p=0.103). OR(treatment_7plus3) in npm1_mutation+ = 0.957; in npm1_mutation- = 1.041.
Interaction coef = 0.2608 (p=6.65e-07). OR(treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine) in npm1_mutation+ = 1.262; in npm1_mutation- = 0.972.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within `complex_karyotype`=1 patients, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` is associated with a different objective_response rate than not receiving it.
There is an interaction between `treatment_7plus3` and `complex_karyotype`: 7+3 is less effective in complex-karyotype patients than non-complex.

analyses.code: Among complex_karyotype==1: chi2 of treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine vs objective_response
analyses.result_summary: Within complex karyotype (n=7462): response = 0.1749 on ven+aza vs 0.1634 off; chi2 p=0.203.
Interaction coef = -0.2132 (p=0.00164). OR(7+3) in complex+ = 0.846; in complex- = 1.048.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among older (age>=75) patients, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` is associated with higher objective_response rate vs not receiving it.
Among older (age>=75) patients, `treatment_7plus3` is associated with a lower objective_response rate vs not receiving it.

analyses.code: Among age_years>=75: chi2 of treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine vs objective_response
analyses.result_summary: Within age>=75 (n=13311): response = 0.1699 on ven+aza vs 0.1683 off; chi2 p=0.826.

analyses.code: Among age_years>=75: chi2 of treatment_7plus3 vs objective_response
analyses.result_summary: Within age>=75 (n=13311): response = 0.1724 on 7+3 vs 0.1661 off; chi2 p=0.34.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After multivariable adjustment for AML driver mutations and clinical features, `treatment_midostaurin × flt3_itd` retains a positive effect on objective_response.
After multivariable adjustment, `treatment_ivosidenib × idh1_mutation` retains a positive effect on objective_response.
After multivariable adjustment, `treatment_enasidenib × idh2_mutation` retains a positive effect on objective_response.

analyses.code: Multivariable logit with treatment×biomarker interactions and clinical adjustments
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coef for treatment_midostaurin:flt3_itd = -0.1022 (OR = 0.903), p = 0.232.

analyses.code: Multivariable logit with treatment×biomarker interactions and clinical adjustments
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coef for treatment_ivosidenib:idh1_mutation = -0.3798 (OR = 0.684), p = 0.0218.

analyses.code: Multivariable logit with treatment×biomarker interactions and clinical adjustments
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coef for treatment_enasidenib:idh2_mutation = -0.1245 (OR = 0.883), p = 0.449.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `fatigue_grade` is associated with a lower probability of objective_response.
Higher `pain_nrs` is associated with a lower probability of objective_response.
Higher `dyspnea_grade` is associated with a lower probability of objective_response.
Higher `appetite_loss_grade` is associated with a lower probability of objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: fatigue_grade: logistic coef per SD = 0.0149 (OR = 1.015), p = 0.21.
pain_nrs: logistic coef per SD = 0.0114 (OR = 1.011), p = 0.34.
dyspnea_grade: logistic coef per SD = -0.0218 (OR = 0.978), p = 0.0695.
appetite_loss_grade: logistic coef per SD = -0.0249 (OR = 0.975), p = 0.0383.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `total_bilirubin_mg_dl` is associated with a lower probability of objective_response.
Higher `creatinine_mg_dl` is associated with a lower probability of objective_response.
Higher `inr` is associated with a lower probability of objective_response.
Higher `bmi` is associated with a different probability of objective_response.
Higher `alkaline_phosphatase_u_l` is associated with a lower probability of objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: total_bilirubin_mg_dl: logistic coef per SD = -0.0158 (OR = 0.984), p = 0.188.
creatinine_mg_dl: logistic coef per SD = -0.0064 (OR = 0.994), p = 0.592.
inr: logistic coef per SD = 0.0227 (OR = 1.023), p = 0.057.
bmi: logistic coef per SD = 0.0078 (OR = 1.008), p = 0.514.
alkaline_phosphatase_u_l: logistic coef per SD = 0.0233 (OR = 1.024), p = 0.0478.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among unfit-for-intensive patients with TP53 mutation, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` is associated with a different objective_response rate than not receiving it.
There is a three-way interaction such that `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` particularly benefits patients who are both `unfit_for_intensive` AND `tp53_mutation`-positive.
Education years (continuous `education_years`) is positively associated with objective_response (more education → higher response).

analyses.code: Among unfit_for_intensive==1 & tp53_mutation==1: chi2 of treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine vs objective_response
analyses.result_summary: Within unfit & TP53+ (n=2076): response = 0.1766 on ven+aza vs 0.1728 off; chi2 p=0.865.
Three-way interaction coef = -0.0083 (OR = 0.992), p = 0.96.
education_years: logistic coef per SD = 0.0012 (OR = 1.001), p = 0.922.
